programs.title: Deadly Waters With Captain Lee
programs.desc: Three missing fingers point to the identity of a body found off the coast of Catalina Island, plunging authorities into the mysterious investigation of a wealthy mogul, luxurious yacht and a manhunt for a killer hiding in an unlikely place.

programs.title: Below Deck
programs.desc: Kelley asks Jennice out on a date, and it doesn't go according to plan. The new guests turn the Ohana sky deck into a stock trading floor. Logan turns the charm towards the primary guest's girlfriend.

programs.title: Next Gen Nyc
programs.desc: Ariana and Riley reconnect after a decade apart. Charlie struggles to hide his irritation as a Brooklyn night out shifts from cocktails to chaos. Brooks and Gia update their moms, Meredith and Teresa,.

programs.title: Summer House
programs.desc: Carl gets back in the game with a new girl. Kyle and Craig finally address the elephant in the room. A late-night rendezvous creates drama for the entire house.

programs.title: Snapped
programs.desc: After a loving father is found dead in the bedroom of his Oklahoma home by his ex-wife, police must unpack a complex family dynamic and a loyalty based on greed in order to get answers.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Shockwaves from an unexpected news article continue to spread as the ladies try to piece together the truth; Garcelle serves up a Haitian holiday meal for her family; When Kyle gathers the ladies for Christmas dinner, holiday cheer turns to jeer.
